name: Fried Garlic Chicken Balls
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Peanut oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chicken with all of the seasonings and egg whites. Blend thoroughly.
2. Form into balls about the size of large walnuts and place on waxed paper.
3. When all balls are formed, mix the cornstarch with the water-chestnut flour.
4. Roll each ball in this mixture.
5. Deep fry in several batches in 360 degree oil until the balls float to the surface and turn golden brown, approximately 5 minutes.
6. Test one for doneness before serving.
